statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

articles.headline: Fantasy women's hoops lineup advice: Four players to add after opening weekend
articles.description: Andre Snellings recaps a busy opening weekend with surprises, standouts and four players to add to your lineup this week.

images.name: Odyssey Sims [1296x729]
images.caption: Odyssey Sims of the Dallas Wings is available in 84.6% of ESPN leagues.

images.name: Tiffany Hayes [1296x729]
images.caption: Tiffany Hayes of the Golden State Valkyries is available in two thirds of ESPN leagues.

images.name: Caitlin Clark’s 20 points not enough in Fever opener loss
images.caption: Caitlin Clark’s 20 points not enough as Fever fall to Wings in opener 107-104.

articles.headline: Early WNBA takeaways: Clark is back, Wings impress, Reese bolsters Dream
articles.description: Even with a short roster, New York is a front-runner, Phoenix has no shortage of talent, and the Dream are even better.

images.name: Caitlin Clark’s 20 points not enough in Fever opener loss
images.caption: Caitlin Clark’s 20 points not enough as Fever fall to Wings in opener 107-104.

articles.byline: Michael Voepel and Kareem Copeland and Alexa Philippou and Kendra Andrews

articles.headline: Dallas hosts Atlanta following Ogunbowale's 22-point game
Minnesota visits Phoenix after Miles' 21-point showing
articles.description: Minnesota Lynx (0-1) at Phoenix Mercury (1-1, 1-1 Western Conference)

articles.headline: Golden State Valkyries vs. Phoenix Mercury - Game Highlights

images.name: Golden State Valkyries vs. Phoenix Mercury - Game Highlights
images.caption: Watch the Game Highlights from Golden State Valkyries vs. Phoenix Mercury, 05/10/2026

articles.headline: Janelle Salaun scores 21 points off the bench and Valkyries beat Mercury 95-79 to win home opener
articles.description: — Janelle Salaun scored 21 points off the bench, Gabby Williams contributed 19 points and five rebounds in her home debut for Golden State after the All-Star forward signed last month, and the Valkyries beat the Phoenix Mercury 95-79 on Sunday night.

images.name: Golden State Valkyries vs. Phoenix Mercury - Game Highlights
images.caption: Watch the Game Highlights from Golden State Valkyries vs. Phoenix Mercury, 05/10/2026

articles.headline: Aces rebound from season-opening drubbing with win vs. Sparks
articles.description: In a span of 24 hours, the Aces received their championship rings, suffered a historically bad season-opening loss and then picked up their first win over the Sparks on Sunday.

articles.headline: Carter scores 22, Young adds 20 as Aces beat Sparks 105-78
articles.description: — Chennedy Carter scored 22 points, Jackie Young had 20 points and nine assists, and the Las Vegas Aces beat Los Angeles 105-78 on Sunday in the Sparks' season opener.

categories.description: Las Vegas Aces @ Los Angeles Sparks

event.description: Las Vegas Aces @ Los Angeles Sparks

articles.description: Watch the Game Highlights from Los Angeles Sparks vs. Las Vegas Aces, 05/10/2026

categories.description: Las Vegas Aces @ Los Angeles Sparks

event.description: Las Vegas Aces @ Los Angeles Sparks

articles.headline: Kate Martin lands with Sparks in development roster spot
articles.description: The Sparks on Sunday announced they have signed Kate Martin to a development roster spot, four days after she was waived by the Valkyries.

articles.headline: Liberty take down the Mystics in overtime
articles.description: Liberty take down the Mystics in overtime

images.name: Liberty take down the Mystics in overtime
images.caption: Liberty take down the Mystics in overtime.

articles.headline: Johannes scores 25, Stewart adds 23 and 9 rebounds as Liberty beat Mystics 98-93 in OT
articles.description: — Marine Johannes hit six 3-pointers and scored 25 points, Breanna Stewart had 23 points and nine rebounds, and the New York Liberty beat the Washington Mystics 98-93 in overtime on Sunday.

images.name: Liberty take down the Mystics in overtime
images.caption: Liberty take down the Mystics in overtime.

articles.headline: Storm down the Sun on the road
articles.description: Storm down the Sun on the road

images.name: Storm down the Sun on the road
images.caption: Storm down the Sun on the road

articles.headline: Lexie Brown hits 5 3-pointers and scores 17 as the Storm beat the Sun 89-82
articles.description: — Lexie Brown hit five 3-pointers and scored 17 points, Flau’jae Johnson had 16 and the Seattle Storm beat the Connecticut Sun 89-82 on Sunday.

articles.headline: Caitlin Clark joins Morgan Wallen for Indianapolis concert walkout
articles.description: With Wallen at Lucas Oil Stadium for his "Still the Problem" tour, he tapped into the local hoops scene and was accompanied by Caitlin Clark for his walkout.

images.name: caitlin clark morgan wallen [545x307]
images.caption: With country star Morgan Wallen in Indianapolis for the latest performances of his “Still the Problem” tour, he tapped into the local hoops scene and was accompanied by Caitlin Clark for his walk-out.

images.name: Wings down the Fever in opener
images.caption: The Wings go on the road and start their season with a win over the Fever.
